subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.37
question_html:
Which class of compound is formed when a ketone is reduced?

A. primary alcohol

B. secondary alcohol

C. ether

D. carboxylic acid
examiners_html: 85 % of the candidates identified the secondary alcohol as the product of the reduction of a ketone. The other three distractors (primary alcohol, ether and carboxylic acid) were chosen almost equally by the remaining candidates.
